privileged_info_summary: The main dive log file is located at /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf and the log file to be imported is at /home/ga/Documents/import_dives.ssrf. The data is not synthetic; it consists of real sample dives from actual dive computers sourced from the official Subsurface GitHub repository.
